codestar.githubrepository.Code.Docs: Information about code to be committed to a repository after it is created in an AWS CloudFormation stack.

codestar.githubrepository.ConnectionArn.Docs: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

codestar.githubrepository.EnableIssues.Docs: Indicates whether to enable issues for the GitHub repository. You can use GitHub issues to track information and bugs for your repository.

codestar.githubrepository.IsPrivate.Docs: Indicates whether the GitHub repository is a private repository. If so, you choose who can see and commit to this repository.

codestar.githubrepository.RepositoryAcce.Docs: The GitHub user's personal access token for the GitHub repository.

codestar.githubrepository.RepositoryDesc.Docs: A comment or description about the new repository. This description is displayed in GitHub after the repository is created.

codestar.githubrepository.RepositoryName.Docs: The name of the repository you want to create in GitHub with AWS CloudFormation stack creation.

codestar.githubrepository.RepositoryOwne.Docs: The GitHub user name for the owner of the GitHub repository to be created. If this repository should be owned by a GitHub organization, provide its name.
